blockerReason: credential delivered through chat surface (prompt body) — treated as compromised per standing secret-handling policy; implementer refused to use the token, refused to register the MCP under it, refused to call any mcp__penpot__* tools; rotation + re-registration required before retry
manualActionsRequested: Rotate the Penpot token in Penpot UI (revoke exposed token, generate fresh).
Register the Penpot MCP via CLI from a separate terminal: claude mcp add --transport http penpot --scope user <fresh-tokenized URL> — do not paste the URL into chat.
Restart Claude Code, verify /mcp shows penpot connected, then send 'Penpot ready'.
nextSafeStep: Slava rotates the Penpot token, re-registers the MCP via CLI without exposing the new token in chat, restarts Claude Code, then signals 'Penpot ready'. On that signal Claude executes the full Access Gate (enumerate tools, read file, create MCP Access Test — InsuranceAIPlatform frame, attempt export) and republishes with PENPOT_ACCESS_TEST_PASSED / PARTIAL / BLOCKED as warranted.

figmaFileMoveAndScreenshot.note: independent — awaits Slava manual UI actions in Figma (access check on Team project, move/duplicate from Drafts, PNG export of dashboard frame)
